basic_details.job_title: DSWO Goalpara Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Security Guard, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Office (DSWO Goalpara) has released the official Case Worker, Counsellor, and Security Guard Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the DSWO Goalpara Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 40 years with the prescribed educational qualifications and relevant work experience can attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC, ST(H), ST(P); 3 years for OBC/MOBC; 10 years for PwD

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor in Law/ Social Work/ Sociology/ Social Science/ Psychology with 3 years experience, Professional degree/ diploma in psychology/ psychiatry/ neurosciences with 3 years experience, 2 years experience as security personnel, preferably retired military/ para-military
qualification.details: Case Worker: Any Woman having a Bachelor in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology with at least 3 years experience of working on women related relevant domains in a Government or Non-Government project/programme. She should be a resident of the local community so that local human resource and expertise is utilised for effective functioning of the centre. Counsellor: Any Woman having professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in health sector and preferably with at least 3 years experience of working with a Government or Non-Government health project/programme at the district level. Security Guard: Any person having at least 2 years experience of working as security personnel in a government or reputed organization at the district/state level. He/she should preferably be retired military/para-military personnel.

salary_details.details: Case Worker: Rs. 25,000/- Counsellor: Rs. 25,000/- Security Guard: Rs. 12,000/-

rows.district_social_welfare_officer_dswo_goa: Bachelor in Law/ Social Work/ Sociology/ Social Science/ Psychology with 3 years experience, Professional degree/ diploma in psychology/ psychiatry/ neurosciences with 3 years experience, 2 years experience as security personnel, preferably retired military/ para-military

content_sections.heading: DSWO Goalpara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DSWO Goalpara Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DSWO Goalpara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DSWO Goalpara Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Case Worker: Any Woman having a Bachelor in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology with at least 3 years experience of working on women related relevant domains in a Government or Non-Government project/programme. She should be a resident of the local community so that local human resource and expertise is utilised for effective functioning of the centre. Counsellor: Any Woman having professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in health sector and preferably with at least 3 years experience of working with a Government or Non-Government health project/programme at the district level. Security Guard: Any person having at least 2 years experience of working as security personnel in a government or reputed organization at the district/state level. He/she should preferably be retired military/para-military personnel.

content_sections.heading: DSWO Goalpara Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC, ST(H), ST(P); 3 years for OBC/MOBC; 10 years for PwD

content_sections.heading: DSWO Goalpara Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Case Worker: Rs. 25,000/- Counsellor: Rs. 25,000/- Security Guard: Rs. 12,000/-

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DSWO Goalpara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DSWO Goalpara recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the DSWO Goalpara recruitment is scheduled for 28th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the DSWO Goalpara recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Case Worker, Counsellor, and Security Guard. There is one vacancy for each post, totaling three vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Case Worker post, candidates must be women with a Bachelor's degree in Law, Social Work, Sociology, Social Science, or Psychology, along with at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 12,000/- to Rs. 25,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the General/OBC category. It is implied that other categories also have no application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DSWO Goalpara recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the DSWO Goalpara office. Specific timings and exact venue details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for these posts is contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
